qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authentication Bypass in Workflow Execution Status Endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unauthenticated access to the dynamic-credentials workflow execution-status endpoint and exposed credential metadata, not stored JavaScript execution in n8n-rendered node pages.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing maxFiles limit in multipart/form-data parser allows DoS through resource exhaustion
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Although this finding mentions webhook and Form Trigger endpoints, its root cause is an unbounded multipart parser file-count limit causing resource exhaustion, not stored script injection into rendered n8n pages.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Workflow Import from URL Feature
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns authenticated workflow import fetching an attacker-supplied URL via axios.get, not stored XSS payloads rendered through Form, Chat, Send & Wait, Webhook, or Chat nodes.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described stored-XSS root cause. The advisory and patch references cover script injection into n8n-rendered pages for Form Trigger, Chat Trigger, Send & Wait, Webhook, and Chat nodes through missing sanitization, unsafe rendered HTML, and webhook response-header/CSP handling. The manifest-listed qualifying findings instead cover a dynamic-credentials auth bypass, multipart parser resource exhaustion, and workflow-import SSRF.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-2p9h-rqjw-gm92 describes authenticated workflow creators injecting arbitrary scripts into pages rendered by n8n nodes, leading to victim-browser script execution.
Patch references modify ChatTrigger templates and authentication checks, Form and Send & Wait field parsing/sanitization, and webhook CSP/response-header enforcement.
auth-bypass-execution-status targets GET /rest/workflows/:workflowId/execution-status and credential metadata disclosure.
multipart-dos targets packages/cli/src/webhooks/webhook-form-data.ts missing maxFiles and a denial-of-service condition.
ssrf-workflow-import targets GET /rest/workflows/from-url and direct axios.get(query.url) SSRF.
